headline: Discovered 42 keywords in 8 clusters; transactional intent dominates competitive terms.

recommendations.title: Target 'best seo tools' keyword cluster (12 keywords)
recommendations.rationale: Highest-volume cluster with clear commercial intent. Competitors rank for 8 of 12 terms. Creating a comparison page could capture significant traffic.

recommendations.title: Create FAQ content for informational queries
recommendations.rationale: 15 informational keywords map to common questions. Structured FAQ pages can capture featured snippets and People Also Ask boxes.

evidence: Google Suggest API: 5 seed keywords expanded to 42 unique terms.
